name: incident-response
description: End-to-end Okta MFA-fatigue response: detect, gather control evidence, kill the session under HITL approval. The session-kill is the only write path; --apply requires _approval_context with approver_email + ticket_id + min_approvers >= 1. See examples/workflows/incident-response-okta-mfa-fatigue.md for the matching workflow doc.
